description: Style NoteFor some serious street cred, try this pair of playboy low-tops. With a low ankle, these kicks can be worn with rolled-up denims and a tonal tee. Keep your T-shirt monochrome for a balanced look. Product DetailsBlue and black upper with bunny print and a carbon-rubber toe boxCentral lace-ups with a fabric tongue and innerEVA midsole with foxing at the toe regionTPU outsole with bunny shaped lugs all overMaterial and CareCanvasWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
